flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 35% at Shippensburg University of Pennsylvania vs the 2003–2007 baseline (4.2k vs 6.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Shippensburg University of Pennsylvania rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.2k → $15.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 11 pp at Shippensburg University of Pennsylvania vs the 2003–2007 baseline (51.6% vs 62.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Shippensburg University of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
